name: Cranberry Crisp Coffeecake
recipeIngredient: Kellogg's Sugar Frosted Flakes cereal; crushed to 1 1/2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crushed cereal with melted margarine. Set aside.
2. Stir together flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
3. Beat the softened margarine, sugar, and egg until well blended. Add milk alternately with flour mixture, mixing until smooth.
4. Spread batter in a greased 9-inch round cake pan. Top evenly with cranberry sauce.
5. Sprinkle with cereal mixture. Bake at 350°F for about 50 minutes.
6. Serve warm or cooled.
